examples: When the priest examines him, he shall pronounce him ceremonially unclean.
Take the Levites from among the other Israelites and make them ceremonially clean.
Both the ceremonially unclean and the clean may eat it, as if it were gazelle or deer.
Clinton made the announcement Thursday, barely two hours after the Senate ceremonially opened his impeachment trial.
Video footage released by the Vatican on Friday showed the doors to the papal apartment there being ceremonially sealed by senior officials.
